description: Si riferisce al livello di tensione muscolare. Un polo positivo indica rilassamento e flessibilità, mentre un polo negativo indica rigidità e contrazione.
positive: My shoulders feel light, a gentle release, *délicate* and free from strain.
The muscles in my calves loosen, *sich entspannen*, a comfortable yielding sensation.
Sinto um relaxamento profundo nos ombros, a effortless flow, *un peso que se vai*.
My jaw unclenches, a subtle shift, *una sensazione di libertà* and ease.
The tension in my neck dissipates, *a feeling of lightness*, a quiet surrender.
My fingers are pliable, *suave* and responsive, almost floating.
The tightness in my hips releases, *una dolce liberazione*, a soft unwinding.
My back muscles ease, *un soulagement palpable*, a gentle softening.
The muscles of my thighs relax, *une détente agréable*, a subtle release of pressure.
My abdomen feels supple, *flessibile*, a gentle undulation of ease.
The grip in my hand loosens, *un relâchement progressif*, a yielding warmth.
My facial muscles soften, *una sensazione di distensione*, a peaceful repose.
My legs feel fluid, *leicht und geschmeidig*, a comfortable extension.
The tightness in my chest diminishes, *un sentiment de légèreté*, a gentle openness.
My fingers extend effortlessly, *una sensazione di morbidezza*, a quiet grace.
The tension in my lower back fades, *un sentimiento de alivio*, a subtle release.
My jaw releases, *un relâchement subtil*, a quiet stillness.
The muscles in my arms yield, *una dolce cedevolezza*, a gentle ease.
My spine feels elongated, *un sentiment de longueur*, a quiet stretch.
The tension in my feet lessens, *un sentiment de détente*, a comfortable lightness.
My neck muscles soften, *un relâchement agréable*, a gentle release.
The tightness in my shoulders eases, *una sensazione di libertà*, a quiet yielding.
My abdomen relaxes, *sich entspannen*, a gentle softening.
My legs are loose, *una sensazione di flessibilità*, a comfortable extension.
The grip in my hand loosens, *un sentiment de relâchement*, a quiet warmth.
My facial muscles relax, *un sentiment de légèreté*, a peaceful repose.
My fingers are pliable, *una sensazione di morbidezza*, a quiet grace.
The tension in my lower back fades, *une détente progressive*, a subtle release.
My jaw releases, *una dolce cedevolezza*, a quiet stillness.
The muscles in my arms yield, *leicht und geschmeidig*, a gentle ease.
My spine feels elongated, *un sentiment de longueur*, a quiet stretch.
The tension in my feet lessens, *un sentimiento de alivio*, a comfortable lightness.
My neck muscles soften, *una sensazione di distensione*, a gentle release.
The tightness in my shoulders eases, *délicate*, a quiet yielding.
My abdomen relaxes, *flessibile*, a gentle softening.
My legs are loose, *suave*, a comfortable extension.
The grip in my hand loosens, *una dolce liberazione*, a quiet warmth.
negative: My shoulders are rigid, a tight knot, *un serramento palpabile* and unyielding.
The muscles in my calves are tense, *steif*, a restricted movement.
Sinto uma tensão forte nos ombros, *un peso que aperta*, a rigid constraint.
My jaw is clenched, *une tension palpable*, a fixed and uncomfortable posture.
The tension in my neck is acute, *una sensazione di costrizione*, a sharp stiffness.
My fingers are stiff, *rigide*, resisting any bending.
The tightness in my hips is severe, *una forte contrazione*, a hindering pressure.
My back muscles are contracted, *un serramento intenso*, a painful rigidity.
The muscles in my thighs are constricted, *une tension désagréable*, a limiting force.
My abdomen feels hard, *una sensazione di tensione*, a restricting pressure.
The grip in my hand is tight, *une prise ferme*, a constricted hold.
My facial muscles are strained, *una sensazione di rigidità*, a forced expression.
My legs feel heavy, *pesante*, a constrained movement.
The tightness in my chest is oppressive, *un sentiment d'oppression*, a constricted feeling.
My fingers are inflexible, *una sensazione di irrigidimento*, a stubborn resistance.
The tension in my lower back is throbbing, *un sentimiento de dolor*, a debilitating stiffness.
My jaw is locked, *un serramento involontario*, an unyielding grip.
The muscles in my arms are contracted, *una sensazione di tensione*, a hindering force.
My spine feels compressed, *un sentiment d'oppression*, a constricted feeling.
The tension in my feet is intense, *un sentiment d'inconfort*, a restricted movement.
My neck muscles are rigid, *une tension persistante*, a sharp stiffness.
The tightness in my shoulders is binding, *una sensazione di costrizione*, a limiting force.
My abdomen is taut, *una sensazione di pesantezza*, a restricting pressure.
My legs are stiff, *una sensazione di rigidità*, a constrained movement.
The grip in my hand is clenched, *une prise douloureuse*, a constricted hold.
My facial muscles are frozen, *una sensazione di tensione*, a forced expression.
My fingers are inflexible, *una sensazione di irrigidimento*, a stubborn resistance.
The tension in my lower back is radiating, *une douleur lancinante*, a debilitating stiffness.
My jaw is fixed, *un serramento involontario*, an unyielding grip.
The muscles in my arms are contracted, *una sensazione di pesantezza*, a hindering force.
My spine feels restricted, *un sentiment d'oppression*, a constricted feeling.
The tension in my feet is palpable, *un sentiment d'inconfort*, a restricted movement.
My neck muscles are constricted, *une tension intense*, a sharp stiffness.
The tightness in my shoulders is binding, *una sensazione di rigidità*, a limiting force.
My abdomen is hard, *une prise ferme*, a restricting pressure.
